title: SmartStore Food Storage Containers 0.5L Set of 5 - Suitable for Fridge and Freezer - BPA Free Meal Prep Containers Reusable, Microwavable, Dishwasher Safe, Stackable and Nestable
features: Food containers with lids: Smartstore Frost set of 5 food containers are great for fridge and freezer storage - lowest temp -40°c, tight lids give a secure seal, while finger holes at the corners make it easy to open, vol: 0.5l, dims: 12 x 12 x 6.5cm

Space saving food prep containers: food prep is made easy with these handy containers keeping your fridge - freezer tidy, the modular boxes nest to save storage space and stack to optimise fridge and freezer organisation and overview,

Reusable and dishwasher safe: their plastic food containers with lids can withstand temperatures up to 100°c and are fully dishwasher safe. So clean up is effortless. We recommend placing them in the top rack of the dishwasher
Convenient microwave safe containers: the 100% bpa free food containers are microwavable, making it quick and easy to reheat your frozen meals - make sure to remove lid before microwaving
Durable and food safe: SmartStore food boxes are made in Finland from strong and tough plastic that is safe and tested for food contact - meets all EU regulations for food contact materials
description: From the manufacturer Safe for Food SmartStore Frost containers are made from certified food-grade materials and are BPA-free, ensuring safe storage for all types of food. Ideal for fridge and freezer use, they help keep your ingredients fresh and protected. Extreme Temperature Ready Built to withstand temperatures from -40°C to +100°C, these containers are perfect for freezing, microwaving (without the lid), and dishwashing. A reliable choice for everyday kitchen needs. Easy to Open The tight-fitting lid features smart corner finger holes for effortless opening, even straight from the freezer. Designed for convenience without compromising on seal quality. Nordic Quality Crafted with precision and care in Finland, SmartStore Frost combines Nordic quality with practical design. A trusted solution for organized and efficient food storage. SmartStore Frost Perfect for storing food in the freezer or fridge Frost 6 x 0,3L – Small Frost 5 x 0,5L - Medium Frost 4 x 0,75L - Large Frost 3 x 1L – Extra Large Frost 2 x 1,2L – XXL Rectangular Dimensions 12 x 12 x 4,5 cm 12 x 12 x 6,5 cm 12 x 12 x 9,5 cm 12 x 12 x 12,5 cm 24 x 12 x 6,5 cm Discover durable storage solutions

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher safe, place in top rack. Microwave safe (without lid)
